React Native Components

@auraform/native provides neumorphic primitives for React Native with SVG-based shadows (consistent on iOS and Android) and automatic OS accessibility detection.

Note: The React Native package currently includes the provider, surface primitive, and accessibility hooks. Higher-level components are planned for a future release.

Installation

npm install @auraform/native @auraform/core react-native-shadow-2 react-native-svg

If using Expo:

npx expo install react-native-svg
npm install @auraform/native @auraform/core react-native-shadow-2

NativeAuraformProvider

Root context provider. Computes neumorphic tokens and detects OS accessibility settings.

import { NativeAuraformProvider } from '@auraform/native';

function App() {
  return (
    <NativeAuraformProvider baseColor="#e0e0e0" intensity={15}>
      {/* Your app */}
    </NativeAuraformProvider>
  );
}

| Prop | Type | Default | Description | |------|------|---------|-------------| | baseColor | string | required | Hex color for the background theme | | intensity | number | 15 | Lightness shift (%) for shadow generation | | children | ReactNode | — | App content |

When OS Bold Text is enabled, intensity is automatically increased by +5.

NativeSurface

Base neumorphic building block using react-native-shadow-2 for SVG shadows.

<NativeSurface elevation="medium" borderRadius={16}>
  <Text>Hello from a neumorphic surface!</Text>
</NativeSurface>

| Prop | Type | Default | Description | |------|------|---------|-------------| | elevation | Elevation | "medium" | Shadow depth level | | isInset | boolean | false | Renders as flat view (inset not natively supported) | | borderRadius | number | 12 | Border radius in px | | style | ViewStyle | — | Additional styles |

Accessibility Hooks

useReduceMotion()

Returns true when "Reduce Motion" is enabled.

const reduceMotion = useReduceMotion();

useBoldText()

Returns true when "Bold Text" is enabled.

const boldText = useBoldText();

useNativeAuraform()

Hook to access tokens and accessibility state from context.

const { tokens, baseColor, reduceMotion, highContrast } = useNativeAuraform();

| Property | Type | Description | |----------|------|-------------| | tokens | AuraformTokens | Generated neumorphic tokens | | baseColor | string | Original hex color | | reduceMotion | boolean | OS reduce motion setting | | highContrast | boolean | OS bold text setting |

Auraform UI

Accessibility-first neumorphic React components. MIT Licensed.

Built with Next.js. Styled with Tailwind CSS.
